ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the employee works */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "years_with_company" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has worked at the company */,
  "benefits_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefits package assigned to the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Employee's salary */,
  "job_rating" INTEGER /* Job performance rating */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the employee */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., Full Time, Part Time, Contractor) */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (e.g., Regular, Temporary, Intern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES employee_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_benefits_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefits_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefits_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefits_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefits package */,
  "benefits_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefits package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefits provided */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details (e.g., health, dental, retirement) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefits package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefits_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being rated */,
  "rating_year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance rating */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Overall performance rating */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the performance */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the performance rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount at the time of record */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this salary became effective */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee at the time of record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., Full Time, Half-Time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the training */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting time off */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the requested time off */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the requested time off */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of time off (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_awards_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
